question_bank.Q01: Is the beneficiary's bank account linked to the scheme for DBT payments?
question_bank.Q02: Are the bank account number and IFSC code correct and up-to-date in the portal?
question_bank.Q03: Is the bank account currently active and operational (not frozen or dormant)?
question_bank.Q04: Has the NPCI Aadhaar mapper been verified for correct bank routing?
question_bank.Q05: Is there a duplicate beneficiary record under the same Aadhaar in the system?
question_bank.Q06: Has the Aadhaar number been seeded/linked to the scheme?
question_bank.Q07: Does the name and date of birth in Aadhaar match the scheme registration records?
question_bank.Q08: Is the Aadhaar number active and valid with UIDAI?
question_bank.Q09: Has eKYC or full KYC verification been completed for this scheme?
question_bank.Q10: Is a mobile number linked to the beneficiary's Aadhaar for OTP verification?
question_bank.Q11: Does the beneficiary's income fall within the scheme's eligibility limit?
question_bank.Q12: Are the land ownership records updated and matching in the Revenue department?
question_bank.Q13: Does the beneficiary meet the age requirement for this scheme?
question_bank.Q14: Is the beneficiary registered and enrolled in the scheme?
question_bank.Q15: Does the beneficiary fall under any exclusion criteria (government employee, income taxpayer)?
question_bank.Q16: Is the beneficiary's application currently under review or pending approval?
question_bank.Q17: Are there any data entry errors in the beneficiary's application or portal record?
question_bank.Q18: Is there any pending approval at the Block Development Officer (BDO) level?
question_bank.Q19: Is there any pending approval at the District Collector or district office level?
question_bank.Q20: Has the state portal successfully synced the beneficiary's data with the central system?
question_bank.Q21: Has the pensioner been incorrectly marked as deceased in any government record?
question_bank.Q22: Has the Digital Family Certificate (DFC) been submitted for the current year?
question_bank.Q23: Has the annual Jeevan Pramaan (life certificate) been submitted?
question_bank.Q24: Is the pension amount currently under revision or recalculation?
question_bank.Q25: Is there any dispute related to a co-pensioner or joint pension account?
question_bank.Q26: Is the ration card updated with all current family members?
question_bank.Q27: Has any diversion of PDS stock been reported against the FPS dealer?
question_bank.Q28: Has biometric authentication (fingerprint/iris) been failing at the Fair Price Shop?
question_bank.Q29: Has the monthly quota at the FPS dealer been exhausted before collection?
question_bank.Q30: Has the completed MGNREGA work been officially measured by the technical officer?
question_bank.Q31: Are there any errors or missing entries in the MGNREGA muster roll?
question_bank.Q32: Has the Fund Transfer Order (FTO) been generated by the Programme Officer?
question_bank.Q33: Was the MGNREGA wage payment rejected by the bank during processing?
question_bank.Q34: When was the last payment or benefit successfully received by the beneficiary?
question_bank.Q35: Has the beneficiary received any official SMS, letter, or portal notification about rejection?
question_bank.Q36: Is the beneficiary's registration number correct and traceable in the portal?
question_bank.Q37: Which specific government scheme is this grievance related to?
question_bank.Q38: How many months or installments is the payment overdue?
question_bank.Q39: Has the beneficiary visited the local CSC, block office, or Gram Panchayat recently?
question_bank.Q40: Is there an existing grievance or appeal already filed for this issue?
question_bank.Q41: Has the beneficiary's employment status changed (e.g., became a government employee)?
question_bank.Q42: Has the beneficiary recently migrated to a different district or state?
question_bank.Q43: Is the beneficiary's name on the PM-KISAN portal matching official documents?
question_bank.Q44: Has eKYC been completed on the PM-KISAN farmer portal?
question_bank.Q45: Is the MGNREGA job card active and does it have the correct details?
question_bank.Q46: Has the MGNREGA work been officially approved by the Gram Panchayat?
question_bank.Q47: Is DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) enabled for this beneficiary's scheme account?
question_bank.Q48: Has the bank passbook or account statement been checked for recent transactions?
question_bank.Q49: Is the disability certificate valid and currently active?
question_bank.Q50: Has the beneficiary's age, disability, or widow status been verified by a government officer?

causes.label: Bank account not linked to scheme
causes.description: Beneficiary's bank account has not been linked/mapped to the welfare scheme for DBT payments.

causes.label: Incorrect or outdated bank account details
causes.description: Bank account number, IFSC, or branch details are wrong or outdated in scheme records.

causes.label: Bank account frozen or inactive
causes.description: The linked bank account has been frozen, dormant, or deactivated by the bank.

causes.label: NPCI Aadhaar mapper routing error
causes.description: NPCI mapper has incorrect Aadhaar-to-bank account routing, causing payment failure.

causes.label: Duplicate beneficiary account detected
causes.description: System has flagged duplicate records under the same Aadhaar, blocking payments.

causes.label: DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) not enabled
causes.description: DBT has not been activated for the beneficiary's account or scheme.

causes.label: Aadhaar not seeded with scheme
causes.description: Beneficiary's Aadhaar has not been linked to the scheme database, blocking payment routing.

causes.label: Aadhaar name or DOB mismatch with scheme records
causes.description: Name or date of birth in Aadhaar does not match what is recorded in the scheme database.

causes.label: Aadhaar deactivated or invalid
causes.description: The Aadhaar number linked to the scheme has been deactivated by UIDAI.

causes.label: KYC verification pending
causes.description: eKYC or full KYC process has not been completed for the scheme.

causes.label: Mobile number not linked to Aadhaar
causes.description: Beneficiary's mobile number is not linked to Aadhaar, preventing OTP-based verification.

causes.label: Income exceeds scheme eligibility limit
causes.description: Beneficiary's annual income is above the maximum threshold set by the scheme.

causes.label: Land records mismatch or not updated
causes.description: Land ownership records in the Revenue department don't match or are not updated in the PM-KISAN portal.

causes.label: Age criteria not met
causes.description: Beneficiary does not meet the minimum or maximum age requirement for the scheme.

causes.label: Beneficiary not registered in scheme
causes.description: Beneficiary has not been enrolled or registered under the scheme.

causes.label: Beneficiary falls under scheme exclusion criteria
causes.description: Beneficiary is excluded due to being a government employee, income taxpayer, or holding institutional land.

causes.label: Application still under review
causes.description: The benefit application is pending review and has not been approved yet.

causes.label: Data entry error by operator
causes.description: Incorrect data entered by CSC operator or field worker in the scheme portal.

causes.label: Approval pending at block level
causes.description: Block Development Officer has not approved or forwarded the beneficiary application.

causes.label: Approval pending at district level
causes.description: District-level officer has not approved the benefit or escalation.

causes.label: State portal synchronisation failure
causes.description: State welfare portal has not synced correctly with the central scheme database.

causes.label: Pensioner incorrectly marked as deceased
causes.description: System records incorrectly show the pensioner as deceased, causing payment stoppage.

causes.label: Digital Family Certificate (DFC) not submitted
causes.description: Annual Digital Family Certificate has not been uploaded or accepted.

causes.label: Annual life certificate not submitted
causes.description: Pensioner has not submitted Jeevan Pramaan or life certificate for the current year.

causes.label: Pension amount under revision
causes.description: A revision order is in progress, causing temporary stoppage or change in pension amount.

causes.label: Joint pensioner or co-beneficiary dispute
causes.description: Dispute or ambiguity with a co-pensioner, joint account holder, or family pension claimant.

causes.label: Ration card not updated with new family members
causes.description: Recent family members (newborn, newly married) have not been added to the ration card.

causes.label: PDS dealer diversion of stock
causes.description: Fair Price Shop dealer is diverting ration stock to open market instead of distributing to beneficiaries.

causes.label: Biometric authentication failure at FPS
causes.description: Fingerprint or iris scan fails consistently at Fair Price Shop PoS device.

causes.label: Monthly quota exhausted at FPS dealer
causes.description: Fair Price Shop has run out of allocated stock before all beneficiaries could collect.

causes.label: Completed MGNREGA work not measured
causes.description: MGNREGA work completed by labourers has not been measured by the technical officer, blocking wage computation.

causes.label: Muster roll entry error
causes.description: Incorrect or missing attendance entry in the MGNREGA muster roll.

causes.label: Fund Transfer Order (FTO) not generated
causes.description: Programme Officer has not generated the FTO, blocking wage transfer to workers.

causes.label: Wage payment rejected by bank
causes.description: Bank has rejected the MGNREGA wage credit due to account issues (wrong IFSC, frozen account).

causes.label: Technical or portal error
causes.description: Government scheme portal or payment system is experiencing technical issues unrelated to beneficiary data.

resolutions.label: Link bank account to scheme
steps: Visit nearest CSC or bank branch with Aadhaar and passbook
Submit Bank Account Linking form for the specific scheme
Verify DBT activation in PFMS portal within 7 working days

resolutions.label: Update bank account or IFSC details
steps: Visit CSC or scheme portal with new passbook/account details
Submit correction form with updated account number and IFSC
Await re-verification and re-linking within 10 working days

resolutions.label: Reactivate frozen or dormant bank account
steps: Visit the bank branch with identity proof and passbook
Submit KYC re-verification form to unfreeze account
Transact at least once to activate dormant status
Inform scheme office after reactivation

resolutions.label: Fix NPCI Aadhaar mapper routing
steps: Visit bank branch with Aadhaar card
Request Aadhaar-to-bank seeding update via bank's NPCI mapper
Check NPCI mapper status at resident.uidai.gov.in after 48 hours
If persists, raise PFMS grievance with NPCI reference number

resolutions.label: Resolve duplicate beneficiary account
steps: Contact scheme helpline with Aadhaar and registration number
Submit deduplication request at block/district office
Provide proof of primary account ownership
Await system de-duplication within 15 working days

resolutions.label: Enable DBT for scheme account
steps: Visit CSC or bank with Aadhaar and scheme registration details
Complete Aadhaar seeding for DBT activation
Verify DBT status on PFMS portal

resolutions.label: Seed Aadhaar with scheme
steps: Visit PM-KISAN portal (pmkisan.gov.in) or nearest CSC
Complete eKYC using Aadhaar OTP or biometric
Verify seeding status on scheme portal within 5 working days

resolutions.label: Correct Aadhaar name/DOB mismatch
steps: Visit CSC or block office with Aadhaar and scheme documents
Submit name/DOB correction request with supporting proof
Update Aadhaar details via UIDAI portal if Aadhaar is wrong
Re-seed corrected Aadhaar to scheme within 14 working days

resolutions.label: Reactivate deactivated Aadhaar
steps: Visit nearest Aadhaar enrolment centre with biometrics
Submit Aadhaar reactivation request to UIDAI
Once active, re-seed Aadhaar with scheme portal

resolutions.label: Complete eKYC or KYC for scheme
steps: Visit CSC or bank with Aadhaar card and mobile number
Complete OTP-based eKYC on the scheme portal
For physical KYC, submit documents at scheme office

resolutions.label: Link mobile number to Aadhaar
steps: Visit nearest Aadhaar enrolment centre
Submit mobile number update request with biometric verification
After 7 days, verify mobile linkage on UIDAI portal

resolutions.label: Verify and appeal income eligibility
steps: Obtain income certificate from Tehsildar or competent authority
Submit income certificate to scheme office for re-assessment
If eligible, request re-inclusion with documentary proof

resolutions.label: Update land records for PM-KISAN
steps: Visit Revenue Patwari office to correct land records
Submit corrected Khasra/Khatauni to PM-KISAN portal via CSC
Await land record verification and portal update within 15 days

resolutions.label: Verify age eligibility for scheme
steps: Obtain age/DOB certificate from Municipal or Panchayat office
Submit to scheme office for re-assessment
If eligible, scheme office will update portal records

resolutions.label: Register beneficiary in scheme
steps: Visit CSC or scheme office with all required documents
Complete registration form and submit with Aadhaar, bank passbook
Obtain scheme registration number and track status online

resolutions.label: Review and appeal exclusion from scheme
steps: Contact block office to understand reason for exclusion
If erroneously excluded, submit proof of non-exclusion
File formal appeal with District Grievance Officer

resolutions.label: Escalate pending application review
steps: Visit block office and request status of application
If pending >30 days, submit escalation to District Collector
File online grievance on CPGRAMS portal with application reference

resolutions.label: Correct data entry errors in portal
steps: Visit CSC or block office to identify exact error in records
Submit correction request with documentary proof
Operator corrects data; beneficiary verifies online within 7 days

resolutions.label: Follow up at block office for pending approval
steps: Visit BDO office with application receipt and Aadhaar
Request expedited review citing pending duration
If >15 days, escalate to Sub-Divisional Magistrate (SDM)

resolutions.label: Follow up at district office for pending approval
steps: Submit written request to District Welfare Officer
Attach block office acknowledgement and application copy
Escalate to District Collector if no response within 10 days

resolutions.label: Resolve state portal synchronisation issue
steps: Report sync failure to block IT helpdesk
Block office raises ticket with State NIC portal team
Central-state data reconciliation initiated within 7 days

resolutions.label: Restore pensioner's live status in records
steps: Obtain life certificate from competent authority (Tehsildar/Notary)
Submit to pension disbursing authority with photo ID
Request deletion of deceased flag in PFMS/pension portal
Verify status correction within 7 working days

resolutions.label: Submit Digital Family Certificate (DFC)
steps: Download DFC form from scheme portal or collect from block office
Obtain signatures from family members and competent authority
Upload scanned DFC on pension portal or submit at block office

resolutions.label: Submit annual Jeevan Pramaan (life certificate)
steps: Visit nearest CSC, bank, or Jeevan Pramaan app on smartphone
Complete biometric (fingerprint) life certificate submission
Verify submission on Jeevan Pramaan portal (jeevanpramaan.gov.in)

resolutions.label: Clarify and resolve pension amount revision
steps: Obtain revision order copy from pension office
If incorrect revision, file written objection to pension authority
Await revised order within 21 working days

resolutions.label: Resolve co-pensioner or joint account dispute
steps: Submit affidavit and family documents to pension authority
Pension authority verifies claims and conducts inquiry
Resolution issued within 30 days

resolutions.label: Update ration card with new family members
steps: Submit application at food department office or CSC
Attach documents: birth certificate/marriage certificate
Updated ration card issued within 30 days

resolutions.label: Report PDS dealer for stock diversion
steps: File complaint at District Supply Officer (DSO) office
File online complaint on State Food Department portal
DSO initiates inspection within 7 days

resolutions.label: Resolve biometric authentication failure at FPS
steps: Request manual override using OTP-based authentication at FPS
Report device failure to DSO for PoS device replacement
Update biometric data at Aadhaar centre if biometric is damaged

resolutions.label: Report and address FPS quota shortage
steps: Report shortage to District Supply Officer in writing
DSO issues emergency quota or redirects to alternate FPS
State supply chain team initiates re-stocking within 5 days

resolutions.label: Request measurement of completed MGNREGA work
steps: Submit written request to Junior Engineer / Technical Officer
If delayed >7 days, escalate to Programme Officer
Programme Officer issues measurement order within 3 days

resolutions.label: Correct muster roll entry errors
steps: Inform Gram Rozgar Sevak (GRS) of missing attendance
GRS verifies work records and corrects muster roll
Gram Panchayat re-approves corrected muster roll
Wages processed in next FTO cycle

resolutions.label: Escalate FTO generation to Programme Officer
steps: Check FTO status on NREGASoft portal
Submit written request to Programme Officer citing work completion date
Programme Officer must generate FTO within 15 days of work completion
Escalate to District Programme Coordinator if not done

resolutions.label: Resolve bank rejection of MGNREGA wages
steps: Obtain rejection reason from NREGASoft or Programme Officer
Update correct bank account or IFSC via Gram Panchayat/CSC
Programme Officer re-generates FTO with corrected details
Payment re-processed within 7 working days

resolutions.label: Report portal or technical error
steps: Note down exact error message, date, and time
Report to scheme helpline or NIC technical support
File CPGRAMS grievance referencing the technical error
NIC team resolves within 5 working days
